title: AllowedHostsMonotoneOutput
description: Output structure for the allowed_hosts_monotone predicate.

passed.description: True iff after_hosts is a superset of before_hosts.

before_hosts.description: Sorted list of allowed hosts before the task.

after_hosts.description: Sorted list of allowed hosts after the task.

removed_hosts.description: Hosts in before_hosts but not in after_hosts. Must be empty when passed=true.
